Petition By Trust Beneficiary For Removal Of Trustee, Appointment Of Successor Trustee, For Final Accounting, And For Determination Of Trustee And Attorney'S Fees And Costs (Probate Code Section 17200 Et Seq.)
Off Calendar Oct-25-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for and with Louise Vogt. Peter Myers for Elvio Recchioni (Respondent).

Pending the appeal and outcome of the appeal Mr. Recchioni is removed as Trustee and the Petitioner will become the Trustee for the appeal period. Trust property is to be turned over within three business days of the order. Status of filing of the accounting and status of the appeal was set for January 9, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Myers waived bond. The Court granted the Petition for Removal, etc. (subject to review of the order). Ms. Ebey is prepare the order.

Petition For Return Of Property, Accounting, Damages, Costs And Fees
Off Calendar Jun-28-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Louise Vogt. Robert Shepard for Elvio Recchioni.

Counsel stated that mediation was unsuccessful, requested the matter be set for trial and discussed the remaining issues that needed to be resolved. The Petition for Return of Property, Damages, Costs and Fees, and the Petition to Approve Accountings were referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial, (order for the same to be signed by the court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition To Approve Accountings.
Off Calendar Jun-28-2010 Text Ruling

Petition For Return Of Property, Accounting, Damages, Costs And Fees
Off Calendar Mar-29-2010 Continued To Jun-28-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Louise Vogt. Robert Shepard for Elvio Recchioni.

ms. Ebey stated that the matter had been mediated before Carolyn Hinshaw last week, that there still were a lot of unanswered questions, that the Italy monies in 2003/2004 were missing in 2005, that she has started additional discoveries at the banks, and that she was requesting the Court order an accounting for the Italy money. Mr. Shepard responded stating that the decedent had capacity in 2003 and that all three were on the account(s). The Court stated that it would not order a separate account for the Italy money, stated that Counsel could continue working with Ms. Hinshaw, and suggested that they may want to subpoena records to find out if a joint account was set up. Ms. Ebey stated that the the Trustee is undervaluating money and that the matter should be set for trial, that they asked for a small distribution, and that the Trustee stated he won't release it without a Court order. The matters were continued to June 28, 2010 for trial setting. The Court stated that Counsel either settle both petitions or both petitions would be set for trial.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR#11218. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition To Approve Accountings.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Elvio Recchioni'S Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-23-2009 Continued To Dec-21-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Shepard for Elvio Recchioni. Amanda Ebey for Louise Vogt.

Mr. Shepard stated that he would have the accounting ready by the middle of December. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The matter was continued to December 21, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of filing of the accounting. Mediation is to be completed by February 26, 2010. Counsel was directed to report status on the mediation to the Examiner by February 23, 2010. Mr. Shepard is to file two accountings. One for the money held in the trust and one for the money outside of the trust. The Petition for Return of Property was continued to March 8, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition For Return Of Property, Accounting, Damages, Costs And Fees
Off Calendar Nov-23-2009 Continued To Mar-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Return Of Property, Accounting, Damages, Costs And Fees
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Continued To Nov-23-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Louise Vogt.

Ms. Ebey stated that she was in communication with Mr. Recchioni, that he obtained Robert Shepard, that Mr. Shepard subpoenaed financial and medical records, and that he planned to file a response. The Court will compel an accounting by Mr. Recchioni. Status on filing of said accounting is set for November 23, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition before the Court was also continued to November 23, 2009. Ms. Ebey is to prepare an order after hearing.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
